mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId , u.user_id AS userId , u.name AS senderName , cm.message , cm.created_at AS createdAt , cm.is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY cm.message_id ASC

SELECT cr.room_id AS roomId , cr.title , cr.created_at AS createdAt , lm.message AS lastMessage , lm.created_at AS lastMessageAt , COUNT(cm.message_id) AS unreadCount
FROM chat_room cr
LEFT JOIN chat_room_user cru ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id
LEFT JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cm.message_id > IFNULL(cru.last_read_message_id, 0) AND cm.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN chat_message lm ON lm.message_id = ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = cr.room_id AND is_deleted = 'N' )
WHERE cru.user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY cr.room_id ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC
